title: Fashion Editorial Watercolor Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Fashion Editorial Watercolor Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Fashion editorial watercolor portrait illustration of an adult Black woman with deep brown skin, cropped natural curls, and a calm warm expression, wearing a cream linen wrap blouse with loose sleeves and small gold earrings, in a soft rainy Paris window-light atmosphere with pale grey-blue background mood. Fine delicate pencil linework over translucent layered watercolor washes, loose fluid brush strokes, wet-on-wet blending, soft bleeding edges, unfinished open edges, visible white watercolor paper texture, deliberate negative space. Waist-up three-quarter angle, gentle head tilt, relaxed shoulders, minimalist editorial fashion sketch aesthetic, refined contemporary portrait mood, flat even reproduction-style lighting, edge-to-edge clarity. No photorealism, no 3D rendering, no bokeh, no depth-of-field blur, no caricature, no harsh outlines, no cluttered background, no logo, no text, no watermark. person: adult Black woman with deep brown skin, cropped natural curls, calm warm expression. background mood: soft rainy Paris window light with pale grey-blue atmosphere. pose crop: waist-up three-quarter angle, gentle head tilt, relaxed shoulders. watercolor language: delicate pencil linework, translucent layered watercolor, wet-on-wet edges, visible white paper.
imagePrompts.title: Watercolor Portrait Black Woman Linen

Fine delicate ink and pencil linework over translucent layered watercolor washes, loose fluid brush strokes, wet-on-wet blending, soft bleeding edges, unfinished open edges, visible white watercolor paper texture, deliberate negative space. Hip-to-head crop, slight three-quarter angle, one shoulder forward, minimalist editorial fashion sketch aesthetic, refined contemporary portrait mood, flat even reproduction-style lighting, edge-to-edge clarity. No photorealism, no 3D rendering, no bokeh, no depth-of-field blur, no caricature, no harsh outlines, no cluttered background, no logo, no text, no watermark. person: adult white man with fair skin, silver-blond wavy hair, lean face, soft thoughtful expression. background mood: quiet spring botanical studio with pale green wash and loose flower hints. pose crop: hip-to-head crop, slight three-quarter angle, one shoulder forward. watercolor language: fine ink linework, layered watercolor washes, open paper edges, negative space.
